title: Sheryl&Rain 23Pcs Diamond Painting Accessories,12 Grids Diamond Painting Storage Boxes, Diamonds Art Accessories 6Pcs Drill Pens,Trays,Spoon,Labels,Tweezers,Diamond Embroidery Tools for Adults
features: 【12Girds Diamond Painting Storage Boxes】 The Diamond Painting Storage Box consists of 12 mini compartments made of clear plastic, which are perfect for organising all your diamond beads as well as being able to give you a clear and quick view of things. Each compartment has a matching lid and is so secure that the small items inside will not get lost or leak out.

【6Pcs Drill Pens】The 3 types of sticky pens can be adjusted according to the position of the diamond, you can stick 3/6/9 diamonds at the same time, so it is faster than ordinary diamond sticky pens and more suitable for sticking diamonds of the same colour in a large area, which can effectively improve the speed of your hand work.

【Practical Diamond Art Accessories】The diamond painting accessories have everything you need and more. Diamond painting tools include 1Pc diamond painting box, 6Pcs sticky pens, 2Pcs trays, 1Pc spoon, 2Pcs elbow tweezers, 1 sheet of stickers, and 10Pcs clays. Whether for beginners or experienced diamond painting enthusiasts, having these tools makes creating your diamond paintings more fun and easy.

【Easy to Use】The Diamond Art Accessories kits are easy for handicraft enthusiasts to use. Our plastic diamond pens and trays are the right size and length for most people and the tools are light in weight. So these are easy for everyone to hold, making the process of making diamond art paintings simpler and more enjoyable.

【Wide Range of Applications】 The 5D Diamond Art Accessories is suitable for sorting various small crafts in an orderly manner, such as rhinestones, beads, glitter, sequins, nail art trinkets, and more. It can also be used as a nail art tool or for making mobile phone decorations.
